approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and continue safe sprint slices across the intelligence pipe.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub morning proposed-cards packet from Build Portfolio groups without creating cards or authorizing builds.
constraints: Do not create backlog cards, Scoper records, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, approval records, route records, destination records, Harlan messages, model calls, extraction runs, connector probes, browser sessions, or external writes.
Do not auto-promote Director, Scoper, Portfolio, or proposed-card recommendations into backlog, sprint, route action, Harlan, or build execution.
Every proposed card must remain draft_requires_steve_approval and draft_only.
Fail proof if any proposed card claims it was created, promoted, opened in Current Sprint, externally sent, or authorized for build.
Read only buildPortfolioReadback; do not create a second Portfolio truth layer.
